title: BEM-887 product template
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/product_repositories/templates').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

template = {
  'repository_id':'PROD-EXAMPLE-001',
  'repository_name':'example-product-repository',
  'owner_object':'OBJ-DIR-001',
  'worker_object':'OBJ-WRK-001',
  'status':'candidate',
  'purpose':'client or product implementation repository governed by managing contour',
  'allowed_capabilities':['build','support','repair','upgrade','extend','learn_from_feedback'],
  'required_links':{
    'rule_registry':'governance/state/rule_registry.json',
    'channel_registry':'governance/state/channel_registry.json',
    'event_log':'governance/logs/event_log.jsonl'
  },
  'feedback_route':'product curator -> managing contour worker curator -> director curator if rule update is needed',
  'created_at_utc3':'2026-05-29T23:40:00+03:00'
}
Path('governance/product_repositories/templates/product_repository_registration_template.json').write_text(json.dumps(template, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

schema = {'required':['repository_id','repository_name','owner_object','worker_object','status','purpose','allowed_capabilities','required_links','feedback_route','created_at_utc3']}
Path('governance/state/product_repository_registration_schema.json').write_text(json.dumps(schema, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

registry_path = Path('governance/state/product_repository_registry.json')
registry = json.loads(registry_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if registry_path.exists() else {'status':'active','repositories':[]}
repos = registry.setdefault('repositories', [])
if not any(r.get('repository_id') == template['repository_id'] for r in repos):
    repos.append(template)
registry['status'] = 'active'
registry['registration_template'] = 'governance/product_repositories/templates/product_repository_registration_template.json'
registry['registration_schema'] = 'governance/state/product_repository_registration_schema.json'
registry_path.write_text(json.dumps(registry, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
for f in schema['required']:
    if f not in template:
        errors.append('template missing ' + f)
for repo in registry.get('repositories', []):
    for f in schema['required']:
        if f not in repo:
            errors.append(repo.get('repository_id','unknown') + ' missing ' + f)
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'

tool = '''# BEM-887 product repository registration validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
schema = json.loads(Path("governance/state/product_repository_registration_schema.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
registry = json.loads(Path("governance/state/product_repository_registry.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
errors = []
for repo in registry.get("repositories", []):
    for field in schema["required"]:
        if field not in repo:
            errors.append(f"{repo.get('repository_id','unknown')}: missing {field}")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_product_repository_registry.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/product_repositories/BEM887_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_REGISTRATION.md').write_text('# BEM-887 Product repository registration\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nTemplate: governance/product_repositories/templates/product_repository_registration_template.json\n\nSchema: governance/state/product_repository_registration_schema.json\n\nRegistry: governance/state/product_repository_registry.json\n', encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM887_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_TEMPLATE.md').write_text('# BEM-887 Product repository template validation\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM887_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_TEMPLATE_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-887 product repository template proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in b.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-882-005':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(b, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/product_repositories/templates/product_repository_registration_template.json','governance/state/product_repository_registration_schema.json','governance/state/product_repository_registry.json','governance/tools/validate_product_repository_registry.py','governance/product_repositories/BEM887_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_REGISTRATION.md','governance/reports/BEM887_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_TEMPLATE.md',str(marker),'governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM887 product repository template ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
